promptTemplate: Polish this retail product image for ecommerce catalog use.

fragments.subject: preserve the same Coca-Cola can identity, keep the original packaging structure and visible branding consistent with the source image
fragments.style: commercial retail photography, shelf-ready packshot, realistic materials, clean edge treatment
fragments.composition: single product, centered, 1:1 square canvas, clean breathing room around the can
fragments.lighting: soft studio lighting with subtle realistic shadow
fragments.color: accurate red aluminum can, clean whites, no oversaturation
constraints: improve polish and clarity without inventing a different product
